title: [FIRRTL] smem with read address from port does not work

features.name: synchronous memory read with port address from module input
features.description: Code should include a synchronous memory with a read port where the read address is sourced directly from a module input port without intermediate buffering

features.name: synchronous memory read with buffered address via node
features.description: Code should include a synchronous memory where read address is first assigned to an intermediate node before being used in a read operation
